preamble_setters.name: \coursefooter
preamble_setters.purpose: Course/project name shown in the footer.

preamble_setters.name: \coverimage
preamble_setters.purpose: Hero photo on the cover, clipped+badge-framed.

preamble_setters.name: \hsgsetsections
preamble_setters.purpose: Declare deck outline; drives the sidebar progress.

preamble_setters.name: \hsgclosingcontact
preamble_setters.purpose: Contact lines inside the closing translucent box.

preamble_setters.name: \hsgclosingtext
preamble_setters.purpose: Override default 'Questions?' headline on closing slide.

frame_helpers.name: \hsgagenda
frame_helpers.purpose: Numbered agenda + concrete-texture column on the right.

frame_helpers.name: \hsgsection
frame_helpers.purpose: Silent: advances sidebar counter; renders no frame.

frame_helpers.name: \hsgstatement
frame_helpers.purpose: One bold green sentence at 36 pt.

frame_helpers.name: \hsgquote
frame_helpers.purpose: Quote on white background. Optional [photo.jpg] renders a circular author avatar next to the attribution.

frame_helpers.name: \hsgquoteinverted
frame_helpers.purpose: Quote on green background. Optional [photo.jpg] renders a circular author avatar next to the attribution.

frame_helpers.name: \hsgfullimage
frame_helpers.purpose: Full-bleed image, small HSG logo overlay.

frame_helpers.name: \hsgtwocol
frame_helpers.purpose: Two-column body via minipages. Left edge aligns with the frametitle (Beamer's native columns shifts content into the margin).

frame_helpers.name: \hsgthreecol
frame_helpers.purpose: Three-column body via minipages. Same alignment guarantee as \hsgtwocol.

frame_helpers.name: \hsgbibliography
frame_helpers.purpose: Render a 'References' slide via biblatex. Requires \usepackage{biblatex}+\addbibresource{...} in preamble.

frame_helpers.name: \hsgvideolink
frame_helpers.purpose: Clickable video thumbnail. Image gets a translucent play-button overlay; whole figure is hyperlinked to the URL.

frame_helpers.name: \hsgbackup
frame_helpers.purpose: Insert an 'Backup' separator and switch top-right progress to 'appendix'. Following slides keep page-badge counting but stop inflating section progress.

frame_helpers.name: \hsgclosing
frame_helpers.purpose: Closing slide: full-bleed campus photo + contact box. Uses preamble setters.

inline_helpers.name: \framesubtitle
inline_helpers.purpose: Tiny grey breadcrumb above the frametitle.

rules_to_follow: Three pdflatex passes. remember-picture overlays settle on pass 2-3.
HSG green is reserved for the sidebar, page badge, and \hsgemph. Never use it for frame titles, framesubtitles, or column headers.
Copy ALL hsg-* assets and the fonts/ directory next to your .tex file.
Sidebar wants 4-6 sections in \hsgsetsections; the same items should appear in \hsgagenda.
Cover and closing layouts are hand-tuned. Do not redefine their templates.
